records.question: Which colleges in FL with an enrollment of 19000 have players named Blake whose high school score is exactly 1600, who played as striker in tryouts that were accepted and have no yellow cards?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT college.cname FROM college
JOIN tryout ON college.cname = tryout.cname
JOIN player ON tryout.pid = player.pid
WHERE player.pname = 'Blake' AND tryout.ppos = 'striker' AND tryout.decision = 'yes' AND player.ycard = 'no' AND college.state = 'FL' AND player.hs = 1600 AND college.enr = 19000
records.pred_sql:
SELECT College.cName 
FROM College 
JOIN Tryout ON College.cName = Tryout.cName 
JOIN Player ON Tryout.pID = Player.pID 
WHERE College.state = 'FL' 
  AND College.enr = 19000 
  AND Player.pName = 'Blake' 
  AND Player.HS = 1600 
  AND Tryout.pPos = 'striker' 
  AND Tryout.decision = 'yes' 
  AND Player.yCard IS NULL
